The '''Imperial Claw Station''' was a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]].

==History==
This Imperial Station granted access to a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route to deep space. This route was previously classified by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but due to an increase in [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] attacks, the former was forced to make access to deep space available to all [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. The station also granted a hyperspace route to the [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]].

{{Ship-stub}}
